steps.title: Identify the boundary line from the graph
steps.content: The horizontal line marking the boundary of the shaded region is at $y = -8$. On this boundary, the inequality becomes an equality: $ry = 128$.

steps.title: Substitute the boundary point to find r
steps.content:
At $y = -8$, substitute into $ry = 128$:
$$r(-8) = 128$$
$$-8r = 128$$
$$r = \frac{128}{-8} = -16$$
That matches choice D — D is correct.
